since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.15%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.76% · BTC +0.59% · Gold +1.64% · Nasdaq100 +1.66%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.15%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.15%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.25%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.25%, MU +7.69%, LRCX +7.44%, SYNA +7.36%, LSCC +7.02%. Laggards: AVAV -4.91%, PLTR -3.62%, SOUN -3.31%, IBM -2.68%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.12% at $151.44
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.12% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
